text.title: jenkins-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for jenkins-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Scripted Pipeline for a standard build-test-deploy workflow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Declarative covers 95% of use cases with better tooling support. Scripted pipelines are harder to read, have no syntax validation, and cannot restart from a failed stage.
